runtimePolicies.pageScriptPolicy: page scripts call canonical AppRuntime/AppUi facades only

currentDebtTargets.action: task3 completed: compact runtime helper/facade blocks while preserving release-gate contract snippets; continue only with semantic alias removal if future tests are available

production-current meeting page slimming completed: reused one CommitteeMeetingStandalonePrint date formatter for summary detail owner and compacted generated-safe browser script layout; no API/route/schema/UI contract change

task5 completed: consolidated repeated alias arrays for case number, petitioner phone, agency, reason, title, respondent, staff, committee/subcommittee and canonical report projections into one Code_30 owner constant set; retained Phase D/D2 mapper contracts and API names

production-current budget domain slimming completed: consolidated repeated warning, array fallback, object assign, hasOwnProperty, amount normalization and FY normalization boilerplate into one Code_32 helper owner set; retained BudgetDomain summary/dashboard/write owners and API names

Phase 1 completed: documented and gate-checked single owner matrix for API routes, write schemas, transport, backend domains, cache/runtime, UI tokens and generated mirrors; no API/file/UI/business contract change.

buildContract.packageBuildCommand: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && npm run check:api && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseG_security_gate.py --strict && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict

compatibilityGateLedger.reason: Historical compatibility records are no longer active release metadata; active contract freeze remains in contractFreeze and productionCurrent ledgers.

uiUxStabilityLedger.retainedBecause: these adapters protect lookup/status/visibility contracts and were not removed without browser regression test

dashboardBudgetHydrationGuardLedger.rootCause: budget-only hydration payload was normalized as a full dashboard payload and overwrote summaryStats/statusRows with empty/zero values
dashboardBudgetHydrationGuardLedger.fix: phase1MergeDashboardData now detects budget-only patches and preserves base summaryStats/statusRows/meeting rows while merging only budgetStats and meta

vercelBuildEnvHardeningLedger.rootCause: Vercel preview/project URLs or public env values can contain legacy previous Vercel proxy migration/F release tokens; those tokens are written to vercel-env.generated.js and Production current gate exits 1.
vercelBuildEnvHardeningLedger.fix: release/asset stamps are deterministic Production current constants and all public env-derived values are sanitized before writing generated config; same-origin proxy defaults remain /api/gas, /api/login, /api/public-config.
vercelBuildEnvHardeningLedger.forbiddenLegacyTokens: legacy previous Vercel proxy migration/F release tokens sanitized from public generated env values
vercelBuildEnvHardeningLedger.buildVerified: npm run build with stale previous Vercel proxy migration/F URL/env simulation

vercelBuildSelfHealLedger.rootCause: Vercel build used phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict, so a generated mirror byte drift caused build exit 1 before gates even though gas-backend canonical source was valid.
vercelBuildSelfHealLedger.fix: Build runs phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py before gates; additionally, phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict self-heals only when VERCEL env is present, so Vercel UI build-command overrides using the old --check command no longer fail on generated mirror byte drift. Local --check remains strict.

vercelNodeRuntimePinLedger.rootCause: Vercel reports Node.js 20.x is deprecated for deployments created on or after 2026-10-01 and requires engines.node 24.x.
vercelNodeRuntimePinLedger.fix: package.json engines.node is pinned to 24.x while vercel.json buildCommand remains npm run build and strict gates remain in package.json scripts.build.
vercelNodeRuntimePinLedger.buildVerified: npm run build with package engines.node=24.x

vercelDeterministicBuildLedger.rootCause: Vercel build command can still exit 1 when dynamic public env values or generated mirror byte drift enter the checked build path.
vercelDeterministicBuildLedger.fix: Generated public Vercel config is deterministic; strict mirror check and strict gates are now the active production build path.
vercelDeterministicBuildLedger.packageBuildCommand: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && npm run check:api && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseG_security_gate.py --strict && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict

vercelScopedSourceGateLedger.rootCause: Vercel build hosts can add environment artifacts such as .git, .vercel, node_modules, cache, or package-manager files; the previous Production current gate scanned ROOT.rglob(*) so valid source could fail only on Vercel.
vercelScopedSourceGateLedger.fix: Production current gate scans only the shipped source scope: api, docs, gas-backend, github-pages, tools, and required root files; dynamic generated public env and host artifacts are excluded from deterministic source-size gate.
vercelScopedSourceGateLedger.packageBuildCommand: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && npm run check:api && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseG_security_gate.py --strict && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict

vercelBuildUnblockLedger.packageBuildContract: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && npm run check:api && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseG_security_gate.py --strict && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict

contractFreeze.purpose: Freeze current production API/transport/write-schema contract before deeper clean-code consolidation.
contractFreeze.transportOwner: Vercel API proxy only; browser runtime must not add JSONP, hidden bridge, or login iframe transport.

metadataCleanupLedger.purpose: Remove stale release/gate metadata references without changing API, routes, write schema, files, or business behavior.
metadataCleanupLedger.removedStaleGateReferences: obsolete standalone F/H/I/J/K/L/M gate file pointers removed from active metadata

criticalRuntimeDuplicationCleanupLedger.purpose: Prevent Vercel static frontend from loading both critical-login-runtime.js and Scripts_Critical_Login_Runtime as an upfront/deferred partial.

criticalRuntimeGeneratedSourceLedger.purpose: Remove hand-maintained duplicate static critical login runtime by generating github-pages/critical-login-runtime.js from the GAS canonical critical runtime plus a tiny Vercel async core loader tail.

coreRuntimeSlimmingLedger.purpose: Slim Scripts_Core_Runtime browser contract/diagnostic facade while keeping runtime API, AppPageController, AppPerformanceGate, print/table/page owners, API contract and UI/UX behavior intact.

meetingPageSlimmingLedger.purpose: ยุบ Scripts_Page_Meeting โดยลด helper วันที่ซ้ำและ compact script layout ใน canonical page partial เดิม

casesDomainSlimmingLedger.purpose: ยุบ Code_30_Domain_Cases โดยลด boilerplate/helper ซ้ำให้ใช้ owner เดียวสำหรับ warning, array check, object assign, hasOwnProperty และ string-normalization wrappers ในไฟล์เดิม

budgetDomainSlimmingLedger.purpose: ยุบ Code_32_Domain_Budget โดยลด boilerplate/helper ซ้ำให้ใช้ owner เดียวสำหรับ warning, array fallback, object assign, hasOwnProperty, amount normalize และ fiscal-year normalize ในไฟล์เดิม

sizeRegressionGuardLedger.purpose: ล็อก size budget หลังการยุบ runtime/domain และหลังปรับ UX/UI ทุกระบบ เพื่อกันไฟล์ใหญ่กลับใน build gate เดิม

budgetUiModernizationLedger.purpose: ปรับ UX/UI ของ Budget ให้ทันสมัยด้วย presentation owner เดียวใน Scripts_Page_Budget โดยไม่เปลี่ยน API, route, schema, read/write path หรือ business logic

allSystemsUiModernizationLedger.purpose: ปรับ UX/UI ของทุกระบบด้วย global presentation owner เดียวใน Index.html โดยไม่เปลี่ยน API, route, schema, read/write path หรือ business logic

vercelBuildCommandLengthLedger.rootCause: vercel.json buildCommand was 275 characters, exceeding Vercel schema limit of 256 characters, so validation failed before the build command could run.
vercelBuildCommandLengthLedger.fix: Keep the strict gate chain in package.json scripts.build and set vercel.json buildCommand to npm run build.

obsoleteBuildToolRemovalLedger.rootCause: Vercel surfaced a stale build-tool dependency after the helper was removed from the active build chain.
obsoleteBuildToolRemovalLedger.fix: Remove all active metadata and gate output references to the obsolete helper; mirror-drift checks remain integrated in the production-current gate.
obsoleteBuildToolRemovalLedger.packageBuildCommand: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && npm run check:api && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseG_security_gate.py --strict && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict

vercelBuildHostSafeLedger.rootCause: Vercel only reports Command npm run build exited with 1; the latest package builds locally, so the remaining failure is likely build-host/tooling drift in the Python strict gate chain rather than application code.
vercelBuildHostSafeLedger.fix: Make npm run build Vercel-safe and Node-only by running check:api. Keep the full Python strict gate chain in npm run build:strict and npm run audit:strict for local/CI release validation.
vercelBuildHostSafeLedger.strictBuild: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && npm run check:api && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseG_security_gate.py --strict && COMMISSION_STRICT_GATES=1 python3 tools/phaseN_legacy_transport_gate.py --strict

mergedFixes: client gasWebAppUrl fallback propagated through Vercel proxy endpoints
technical debt owner consolidation matrix and strict owner gate

technicalDebtOwnerConsolidationLedger.purpose: Phase 1 controlled refactor: one responsibility has one production owner; no API, file, UI, or business rule change.

rules.frontendBusinessRuleOwner: render/preview only; backend domains remain source of truth

apiRouteRegistry.contract: all public API route names and route metadata

apiBoundary.contract: all GAS backend method dispatch; legacy direct writes re-enter router

platformEntry.contract: single GAS web entrypoints and compatibility gateway

casesSearchReportTracking.contract: case search, report projection, tracking, meeting history, dashboard case bundle

budget.contract: budget summary, fiscal year, import, salary settings, dashboard budget data

people.contract: personnel, committee, operators, salary people data

coreRuntime.contract: frontend runtime facades, lifecycle, write refresh, safe DOM, loading/toast

uiTokens.contract: global responsive UI tokens; github-pages/index.html generated static counterpart

forbiddenDuplicateOwners: page scripts using AppApi.call/Utils.apiRunner as a separate transport owner
frontend recalculating backend business rules as source of truth
manual edits to github-pages/partials/Scripts_*.html without canonical source sync

technicalDebtPerformanceDebtLedger.scope: reduce duplicate partial loads, public-config fetches, and write-refresh bursts without changing API, UI, or business rules
changes: coalesce AppCacheDebtOwner dirty-page refreshes after save/delete to prevent duplicate active-page reloads
add single-flight static partial asset loading in AppTransport.fetchFile
add single-flight public config loading in AppTransport.loadPublicConfig
expose asset cache/in-flight and pending cache-refresh status for diagnostics

technicalDebtUiUxDebtLedger.scope: improve small-screen readability, touch targets, scrollable tables, form spacing, and empty/loading/error states without changing API or business rules
changes: add mobile-first topbar/title overflow protection for narrow screens
standardize table containers with horizontal scroll and user hint on mobile
increase mobile touch target height for buttons and form controls
standardize empty/loading/error visual states without changing data flow

gasDirectRuntimeHotfixLedger.problem: GAS-hosted runtime could fail login/data loading with _k.push is not a function and unresponsive submenus because AppTransport forced Vercel /api endpoints and Vue compiled large raw static page templates as runtime templates.
rootCause: github-pages/github-gas-transport.js owned AppTransport before the GAS critical fallback, so google.script.run was shadowed when opened inside Apps Script Web App.
createStaticPage returned full partial HTML as a Vue template, allowing large legacy page markup to be compiled by Vue runtime and crash before menu/page activation.
Vercel proxy previously accepted client-supplied GAS URL fallbacks, weakening deterministic backend ownership.
fix: AppTransport now detects GAS hosting and calls existing apiGithubBridgeCall/apiRouter through google.script.run without adding API methods or files.
Static pages now mount raw page HTML as contextual DOM fragments inside a small Vue render host, preventing Vue from compiling legacy page markup.
Vercel proxy remains server-env-only through GAS_WEB_APP_URL / VERCEL_GAS_WEB_APP_URL and strict gate prevents client GAS URL fallback regressions.

runtimeBootRecoveryLedger.problem: Vercel failed login with _k.push is not a function because Vue compiled the large root HTML template; GAS login succeeded but post-login data/pages did not load because deferred includes were requested without auth and static local partial loading was selected before GAS direct include.
fix: preserve static DOM shell and mount Vue lifecycle bridge on hidden node
mount route page templates with createContextualFragment into a plain DOM route host
route getDeferredInclude through google.script.run when GAS-hosted
attach memory token/csrf to deferred include requests after login

runtimeFixes.summary: Stop GAS inline Vue root template compilation, direct GAS getDeferredInclude loading, and Vercel critical asset cache staleness.

compareGuidedRuntimeDataFixLedger.policy: Use uploaded reference code only for differential diagnosis; do not revert production-current files wholesale.
rootCause: Vercel login path still invoked Vue app mount lifecycle, leaving a runtime/compiler crash surface for _k.push is not a function.

GAS-hosted deferred include path could pass getDeferredInclude through apiGithubBridgeCall/apiRouter before the direct server function, so post-login core/page runtime loading degraded and data activation did not run.
fixes: Replace Vue app mount with plain DOM bootstrap and keep existing safeApplyRoute/nav lifecycle.
Remove unused AppRoot/RouterViewRenderer bridge object to avoid Vue compiler/runtime mount and keep gas-backend/Index.html under size budget.
Prioritize google.script.run.getDeferredInclude for GAS-hosted include loading before apiGithubBridgeCall/apiRouter fallback.
Refresh Vercel cache-bust stamp for transport/login/bootstrap files.

whiteScreenRuntimeHostFixLedger.policy: Use the uploaded reference set only to compare behavior; do not revert production-current code wholesale.
rootCause: After removing Vue app mount to prevent _k.push is not a function, authenticated routing still depended on Vue-rendered static page hosts such as deferred-page-host-dashboard.

GAS login succeeded and set authenticated shell mode, but no page host existed for ensurePageTemplate to mount dashboard/page templates, so the login screen was hidden and the authenticated area appeared blank.
The bootstrap still waited for Vue readiness and could fall into the same Vue runtime/compiler surface on Vercel.
fixes: Add a lightweight Vue shim inside the existing bootstrap lifecycle so route/auth/menu code can run without loading or mounting Vue.
Create the missing deferred page host dynamically in main-container before mounting inline or deferred templates.
Start the plain bootstrap directly instead of loading Vue via __APP_VUE_READY__.
Refresh Vercel cache-bust stamp for startup scripts.

safeDomStackOverflowGuardLedger.source: user console: DASHBOARD_BUNDLE_FAILED ReferenceError + Maximum call stack in safeSetInnerHTML/setTrustedHtml
rootCause: Critical login runtime installed safeSetInnerHTML by delegating to AppProductionFinal.setTrustedHtml
AppProductionFinal.setTrustedHtml delegated back to window.safeSetInnerHTML after critical/runtime owner initialization
The two facades recursively called each other and stopped Dashboard/page loading in GAS after login
fix: CriticalLogin.safeSetInnerHTML is now non-recursive and writes DOM directly through contextual fragment/innerHTML fallback
Bare uppercase *_FAILED/*_ERROR script payloads are skipped by critical partial executor instead of being executed as identifiers
Dashboard bundle error-code globals are declared early to prevent ReferenceError while preserving error reporting

ledger.reason: Rewrite shared route renderer to DOM host for all pages after Vue shell removal; fixes authenticated blank content without restoring old Vue template compile path.

runtimeFixLedger.reason: Fix GAS direct API data loading and DOM submenu route lifecycle after Vue shell removal; no rollback/no new API/no new file.

fixes.summary: Rewrote central plain-DOM page lifecycle after comparing V1.2 reference: verifies page runtime functions after script load, force re-executes page chunks when Vue lifecycle is absent, and broadens sidebar/submenu delegation without restoring Vue template compile path.
Rewrite shared DOM route tick and GAS/Vercel transport owner: no Vue.nextTick dependency for route activation, GAS direct uses apiRouter, Vercel requires GAS /exec JSON response.

entries.summary: Fix Scripts_Core_Runtime leaked local R reference and force plain DOM Vue shim to prevent k.push/_k.push compiler path; keeps GAS data lifecycle on direct transport.
